title: Carp's Sculk Equipment
description: Sculk given form and purpose, combined with the strength and certainty of Netherite!
body:
Formerly a part of my Paxels mod, this mod adds Sculk Equipment and armor.

The armor is almost identical to netherite in stats. Unlike netherite, however, you can infuse it with various potion effects for a set bonus (see recipes below).

Sculk Recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sculk Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839b593cc8314b1ebd5369fcf3b13f837176d12c.png)
![Sculk Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75cf57ce4b0bbeef4620ba7ab055778add039479.png)

The above recipes apply for all netherite-to-sculk recipes. Use different netherite tools for different Sculk tools.

The tools also retain their enchantments!

</details>

Armor Recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


The following image is a sample recipe, this works for all armor pieces, and a full set of the same effect is required for the potion effect to be applied!
![Potion recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e10f354c57b105e58bedc28d7dea15ce6dfac4.png)
Some recipes use potions and some use items.

There are a few effects that require applying a potion onto the armor first.

Potion Armor Recipe List:
- Fire Resistance:
* * Any Sculk armor + Fire Resistance Potion
- Strength:
- - Any Sculk armor + Strength Potion
- Regeneration:
- - Any Sculk armor + Regeneration Potion
- Invisibility:
- - Any Sculk armor + Invisibility Potion
- Slowness:
- - Any Sculk armor + Slowness Potion
- Resistance:
- - Any Sculk armor + Turtle Master Potion
- Jump Boost:
- - Any Sculk armor + Jump Boost Potion
- Night Vision:
- - Any Sculk armor + Night Vision Potion
- Slow Falling:
- - Any Sculk armor + Slow Falling Potion
- Speed:
- - Any Sculk armor + Speed Potion
- Water Breathing:
- - Any Sculk armor + Water Breathing Potion
- Weakness:
- - Any Sculk armor + Weakness Potion
- Absorption:
- - Any Sculk armor + Golden Apple
- Blindness:
- - Night Vision Sculk armor + Fermented Spider Eye
- Glowing:
- - Any Sculk armor + Spectral Arrow
- Saturation:
- - Any Sculk armor + Enchanted Golden Apple
- Levitation:
- - Slow Falling Sculk armor + Fermented Spider Eye
- Levitation IX (upgraded):
- - Levitation Sculk armor + Glowstone Dust
</details>
